testcase.system-out:
HTTP/1.1 200 OK Server: nginx/1.24.0 (Ubuntu) Date: Sat, 14 Feb 2026 13:12:57 GMT Content-Type: application/json; charset=utf-8 Content-Length: 120 Connection: keep-alive X-Powered-By: Express Access-Control-Allow-Origin: * ETag: W/"78-oQE36f1VidkdGeHjvHJaFrW8t0E"
{ "success": true, "name": "Метеоритный флюоресцентный spicy бургер", "order": { "number": 8998 } }

testcase.name: createOrderWithIncorrectIngredients
testcase.system-out:
HTTP/1.1 500 Internal Server Error Server: nginx/1.24.0 (Ubuntu) Date: Sat, 14 Feb 2026 13:12:59 GMT Content-Type: text/html; charset=utf-8 Content-Length: 148 Connection: keep-alive X-Powered-By: Express Access-Control-Allow-Origin: * Content-Security-Policy: default-src 'none' X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff Error 
Internal Server Error

testcase.name: createOrderWithEmptyBody
testcase.system-out:
HTTP/1.1 400 Bad Request Server: nginx/1.24.0 (Ubuntu) Date: Sat, 14 Feb 2026 13:13:00 GMT Content-Type: application/json; charset=utf-8 Content-Length: 61 Connection: keep-alive X-Powered-By: Express Access-Control-Allow-Origin: * ETag: W/"3d-2OjyVsQbcrSKTjJtjBJ5FY7GEPQ"
{ "success": false, "message": "Ingredient ids must be provided" }
